description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, light pink exterior and a glossy, dark chocolate ganache drip cascading down the sides. The top of the cake is decorated with evenly spaced dollops of white whipped cream, forming a ring around the edge. At the center, a single red-and-white striped candle stands upright, surrounded by a larger dollop of whipped cream. The cake sits on a simple, flat white cake board that provides a clean base. The overall appearance is festive and elegant, suitable for celebrations such as birthdays. The cake's surface is shiny and smooth, with the chocolate ganache providing a rich, reflective finish.
description: A round, pink cake with glossy chocolate ganache drip, white whipped cream dollops, and a single striped candle on top, displayed on a white cake board.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle, central whipped cream dollop, and the even spacing of the whipped cream around the glossy chocolate top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chocolate drip and the arrangement of whipped cream dollops, with the candle slightly off-center.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the chocolate ganache drip and the symmetrical whipped cream decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the candle and whipped cream ring, with the chocolate drip pattern visible.
